name: BITS Job Used for Persistence or Download
description: Detects use of Background Intelligent Transfer Service for file download or persistence
query:
// Detect bitsadmin used for downloading or persistence
// Trigger on bitsadmin transfer or addfile commands
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)bitsadmin.*(transfer|addfile|setnotifycmdline|resume)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
